scripts.db:psql: docker exec -it parent-chatbot-postgres psql -U postgres -d parent_chatbot
scripts.spring:killport: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host ('Killed PID ' + $p.OwningProcess) } else { Write-Host 'Port 8080 already free' }"
scripts.spring:start: npm run spring:killport && set WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN=&& set WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN=&& set WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID=&& cd spring-whatsapp-backend && ..\.tools\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin\mvn.cmd spring-boot:run
scripts.start:all: docker compose up -d && npm run start:backend
scripts.dev:all: docker compose up -d && npm run dev:backend
